promptHints: Proteomics enrichment is in late-stage direct-extraction/apply mode; prefer reviewed staged/apply checkpoints over rediscovering earlier seam history.
Treat generated staging collate artifacts as bookkeeping only; the authoritative fidelity checks are the focused enrichment gate plus the post-apply checker.
Proteomics DA fidelity must cover both the handler path and the exported helper path; do not rely on a single green DA gate.
When working this bucket, preserve and verify contrast normalization behavior for auto-generated contrasts as well as full_format/friendly_names contrasts.
Treat R/mod_prot_design.R as a review-frozen public wrapper for this bucket.
The active structural tail is in R/mod_prot_design_builder.R; prefer bounded builder seams there over new wrapper-only review checkpoints whenever a structural stop point is documented.
The current late-stage stop point is the remaining proxy/bootstrap and builder-server registration fan-out in R/mod_prot_design_builder.R.
Use the lipid normalization handover as the current stop map; do not reread the full seam history when the handover already names the staged wave and next step.
The current bounded objective is to review and, if safe, apply the first staged wrapper wave before returning to more in-file seam introduction.
